backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining gym management system types (members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos, pause requests) and core business logic including membership validation, attendance tracking with auto-checkout, and pause request expiry handling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: investigating/fixing member login authentication failures and adding error logging/diagnostics to the member authentication flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for the RawFit Gym application with focus on member/admin authentication, dashboards, and GPS-based video access control.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and OKLCH color system tokens defining light and dark theme variables for a purple/blue fitness-focused color scheme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title "RawFit Gym - Think Fit, Be Fit" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component orchestrating authentication routing for both admin (Internet Identity) and member (membership ID) flows, with health check monitoring, production version verification, smoke test overlay support, and role-based dashboard rendering.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message when users lack permissions, with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin interface for managing member attendance with manual check-in/out, QR code generation, member search, and attendance history display with method badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard overview showing statistics cards for members, diet charts, workout charts, and packages, plus pause request notifications and quick action guidance.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog form for creating or editing diet charts with name, description, and dynamic meal entries including nutritional information (calories, protein, carbs, fats).
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin tab displaying a searchable grid of diet charts with meal counts, allowing creation of new charts and editing existing ones via dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: React component that generates and displays a gym QR code for member attendance check-in/out, with auto-refresh every 30 minutes and download functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: Dialog form component for creating and editing gym members with fields for personal info, membership package, diet/workout assignments, dates, status, and discount calculations in INR.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Admin tab component that displays a searchable grid of gym members with their status badges, package info, and actions to add or edit member profiles.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: Dialog form component for creating and editing membership packages with fields for package type, duration in months, and price in INR with live preview formatting.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Admin tab component that displays a searchable grid of membership packages with INR pricing, edit/delete actions, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Displays pending pause requests as notifications with approve/deny actions, showing member names, request reasons, and timestamps. Includes confirmation dialogs for approving or denying requests with optional admin messages.

Admin tab for managing all pause requests (pending and processed) in a table format with filtering by status. Provides approve/deny actions with dialog confirmations and displays member contact information.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Manages the video library with search functionality, displaying workout videos in a grid with thumbnails, titles, categories, and descriptions. Includes a button to open the video upload dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog for uploading workout videos with form fields for title, category, description, and file selection. Handles file upload with progress tracking using ExternalBlob and displays upload percentage.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog for creating or editing workout charts with dynamic exercise management (add/remove exercises). Each exercise includes name, sets, reps, and instructions fields with form validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Admin interface for managing workout charts with search, create, and edit functionality. Displays workout cards in a grid with exercise counts and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component catching rendering errors and displaying a fallback UI with error message and retry button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component displaying RawFit Gym logo, name, tagline, and user profile dropdown menu with avatar initials and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Member dashboard displaying profile, assigned diet/workout, attendance history, and membership status. Includes pause/resume membership functionality with QR attendance integration.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Header component for member portal with gym logo, branding, and user dropdown menu for profile and logout actions.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card component displaying membership status (active/paused/expired) and pause request status with admin messages and visual indicators.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Video library tab that verifies member location against gym radius before allowing access to workout reference videos.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: QR code scanner card for member check-in/check-out with location verification, camera integration, and real-time attendance status display.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Displays an alert when the frontend version doesn't match the expected production version, with instructions and a button to clear cache and reload.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile by entering name and email, with form validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, manages identity state across the app, and handles delegation identity validation and storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Manages member authentication state in localStorage with cross-tab synchronization, provides login/logout functions, and parses backend validation errors into user-friendly messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including health checks, user profiles, member management, attendance, packages, diet/workout charts, videos, and pause requests with proper caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Provides utility functions to format numbers as Indian Rupees (INR) with proper locale formatting, calculate per-month costs, and coerce legacy dollar-formatted values to INR.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Implements geolocation utilities including Haversine distance calculation, browser geolocation access with error handling, and location verification against gym coordinates with authorized radius checking.
frontend/src/lib/memberAuthLogger.ts: Provides a singleton logger class for structured logging of member authentication events with masked member IDs, attempt tracking, and support for login, validation, storage operations, and cross-tab sync events.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Utility functions for generating, parsing, and validating QR codes for gym attendance, including checksum-based security, timestamp validation, and support for both gym and member QR code types.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed interface for managing dashboard, members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos, and pause requests.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page using Internet Identity authentication with error handling, retry logic, loading states, and branded UI with hero section.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Landing page that presents users with a choice between member and admin login options, with transition handling and branded hero section.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard page with tabbed interface for accessing personal dashboard and video library, featuring responsive design and member-specific header.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: Member login page component with form handling, error states, retry logic, and query cache management for membership authentication.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Version validation utilities that compare reported backend version against expected production version (v1.3.0.0) with normalization and status reporting.
Defines the production smoke test checklist with 17 items across health, admin, and member categories, plus progress calculation utilities.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: Production smoke test overlay dialog that displays a checklist of health, admin, and member flow tests with progress tracking and auto-checking based on health data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities for extracting, storing, and managing parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing with sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme properties, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking member login authentication issues as known problems with features for investigating and fixing the failed login errors.
